label: 79_duvvuri subbarao_duvvuri_subbarao_bank india
description: Dr Duvvuri Subbarao, former Governor of the Reserve Bank of India, delivered keynotes on bank resolution frameworks, financial regulation, and global cooperation. His addresses highlighted challenges in Indian banking and the need for international collaboration.
